# Amulya Gupta — AI Systems Engineer

> Senior Software Engineer at HCLTech building agentic AI workflows, LLM pipelines,
> and production ML infrastructure. M.Tech AI/ML candidate at BITS Pilani. 3+ years
> shipping systems at scale: 20M+ user campaign platform, 60% RAG response time reduction.

PyTorch, TensorFlow, FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, Prefect, Prometheus/Grafana,
Python, AWS, GitHub Actions, Prompt Engineering
